# Version 4.148.0
> **First stable v4 release** · Released June 22, 2026 · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/4.148.0) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v4.148.0)
> **Supersedes [4.147.0](4.147.0.md)** · Rolls up preview-only work that was never released as stable — those changes are included cumulatively below.
> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](4.148.0/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.148.0 ships the v4 line stable — Skia m148, variable fonts, animated WebP and a modernised API. The first stable v4 release rolls up the 4.147 previews — Skia m132/m133/m147, variable-font shaping, animated WebP encoding, zero-copy SKStream.GetData and refreshed native dependencies — then adds RC1 stabilization: Skia m148, two SKPixmap span-correctness fixes, singleton-lifecycle rework, promotion of legacy paint text/font APIs to error, and a WinUI Projection DLL fix for .NET 9.

## Breaking Changes

- **Typeface defaults are resolved eagerly through the font manager** — Skia m132 removed the lazy "resolve default at draw time" pattern. `new SKFont()` now stores `SKTypeface.Empty` (0 glyphs) instead of `null`, so an unset font measures/draws nothing — construct with `new SKFont(SKTypeface.Default)` and detect "unset" with `Typeface.IsEmpty`. `SKTypeface.FromFamilyName("missing")` and `SKTypeface.Default` now go through the font manager and are non-null on every platform (Android used to return `null` for a missing family). Use `SKFontManager.Default.MatchFamily(name)` for strict null semantics. `new SKPaint().Typeface` similarly returns `SKTypeface.Default` instead of `null` — measurement still works. ([#3735](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3735), [#3736](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3736), [#3737](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3737), [#3738](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3738), [#3730](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3730))
- **SKStream.Move(long) throws on out-of-range offsets and is now obsolete** — The underlying `sk_stream_move` offset is a 32-bit int, but the `Move(long)` overload used an unchecked cast that silently wrapped. It is now a checked cast that raises `OverflowException` for large offsets, and the overload is marked `[Obsolete]` (CS0618). Call `Move(int)` with an in-range value — validate/clamp large offsets yourself. ([#3740](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3740))
- **Vulkan backend context and Ycbcr conversion structs restructured** — `GRVkBackendContextNative` drops `fMinAPIVersion`, `fInstanceVersion`, `fExtensions`, `fFeatures` and `fOwnsInstanceAndDevice` — use `fVkExtensions`, `fDeviceFeatures`/`fDeviceFeatures2`, and delete the ownership flag. `GrVkYcbcrConversionInfo` gains a `Components` field (new `GRVkYcbcrComponents` struct), changing its layout. `GRVkImageInfo.YcbcrConversionInfo` retypes to `GRVkYcbcrConversionInfo` and loses value-equality; compare fields explicitly. ([#3741](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3741))
- **Legacy SKPaint text/font APIs and remaining pre-v4 obsoletes are now errors** — The last SKPaint text and font state-reading members and the remaining pre-v4 obsoletes are promoted from warning to error, and the obsolete enum members are trimmed from the reference assembly. Move text metrics and drawing to `SKFont` and `SKTextBlob` per the v3→v4 migration guide. ([#4068](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4068), [#4114](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4114), [#4205](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4205))
- **SKNativeObject.IgnorePublicDispose is now read-only** — The public setter on `SKNativeObject.IgnorePublicDispose` was removed as part of the singleton lifecycle rework; the flag is managed internally. Callers that assigned it were reaching into internal state — remove the assignment. ([#4080](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4080))

## Engine

- **Skia updated through m132, m133, m147 and m148** — The v4 line lands with four engine bumps stacked — the m132 baseline, m133, m147, and the m148 upgrade that finalises the stable release, plus two upstream chrome/m147 bug-fix rolls. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3560](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3560), [#3660](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3660), [#3702](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3702), [#4125](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4125), [#4081](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4081), [#4044](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4044))
- **Legacy typeface bridge kept working during the upgrade** — Adds `sk_fontmgr_legacy_create_typeface` so the managed default-typeface fallback keeps working on top of the newer engine. ([#3744](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3744))
- **Native dependencies refreshed** — Bumps zlib to 1.3.2.1-motley, libpng to 1.6.58, libexpat to 2.7.5 then 2.8.1, freetype to 2.14.3, libjpeg-turbo to 3.1.4.1 and HarfBuzz to 14.2.0 to pick up upstream fixes. ([#3720](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3720), [#3718](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3718), [#3717](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3717), [#4079](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4079), [#3726](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3726), [#4012](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4012), [#4035](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4035))

## API Surface

- **Variable-font shaping and color-font palettes** — Adds variable-font support across SkiaSharp and HarfBuzzSharp and improves color-font palette handling and variable-font robustness for OpenType axis animation and emoji palettes. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3703](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3703), [#3742](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3742))
- **SKSurface and SKCanvas draw APIs take SKSamplingOptions** — `SKSurface.Draw` and `SKCanvas.DrawSurface` gain sampling-options overloads so callers can pick the sampling quality when composing surfaces. ([#3491](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3491))
- **Animated WebP encoding via SKWebpEncoder** — New encoder support for writing multi-frame animated WebP images from SkiaSharp. ([#3771](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3771))
- **Zero-copy SKStream.GetData()** — Exposes the underlying SkData directly, avoiding the buffer copy previously required to convert a stream into an SKData. ([#3772](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3772))
- **HBColor struct and misc HarfBuzzSharp API fills** — Adds an `HBColor` value type for a proper `hb_color_t` representation and fills in missing wrappers while cleaning up naming-convention violations. ([#4000](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4000), [#4001](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4001))

## Bug Fixes

- **SKPixmap/SKBitmap pixel-span stride corrected** — `GetPixelSpan` now uses `RowBytes` for stride instead of a computed value, and the `GetPixelSpan<T>(x, y)` offset uses `Width` instead of `Height` — both fixes prevent out-of-bounds and incorrect pixel access on non-tightly-packed images. ([#4148](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4148), [#4128](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4128))
- **SKPath finalizer crash when SKPathBuilder is collected first** — Fixes a lifetime bug where the SKPath finalizer could touch a freed native handle when the builder finalized first. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3796](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3796))
- **SKGLView redraws after MAUI TabBar tab switches on Android** — Restores rendering when an SKGLView is hosted inside a MAUI TabBar and the tab is switched away and back. — ❤️ [@SimonvBez](https://github.com/SimonvBez) ([#3076](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3076))
- **WinUI Projection DLL located on .NET 9** — Fixes a DllNotFoundException for the WinUI projection assembly when consumed from .NET 9 apps. ([#4084](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4084))

## Lifecycle & Internals

- **Singleton instance lifecycle reworked** — Reworks how singleton native instances are held and disposed so process shutdown and app-domain teardown no longer race with finalizers; `SKNativeObject.IgnorePublicDispose` is now managed internally. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#4080](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4080))
- **Default typeface resolution moved to the managed layer** — Wraps upstream's non-null Default with a managed fallback so every platform gets consistent behaviour and Android API 36+ no longer crashes when the font manager returns null. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3730](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3730))
- **Native-compat gate moved to the SkiaApi cctor** — The native runtime-compat check runs from the `SkiaApi` static constructor instead of a `[ModuleInitializer]`, so it triggers only when the native API is actually touched and plays well with trimming and NativeAOT. ([#4133](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4133))
- **Warnings-as-errors across binding/** — Turns on `TreatWarningsAsErrors` for the binding project and cleans up every warning so regressions are caught at build time. ([#3752](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3752))
- **SkiaSharpGenerator updated and runs on Linux** — Bumps CppAst to 0.21.4 and fixes the generator so C API bindings can be regenerated on Linux, not just Windows. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3714](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3714))
- **PolySharp brings C# 13 to legacy target frameworks** — Adopts PolySharp so the binding project can use C# 13 language features across all target frameworks, including the legacy ones. — ❤️ [@4Darmygeometry](https://github.com/4Darmygeometry) ([#3642](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3642))

## Platform

- **Linux Bionic (Android-native) assets** — Publishes Linux Bionic native assets so SkiaSharp can be consumed from Android-native (bionic) runtimes, not just the managed Android target. — ❤️ [@4Darmygeometry](https://github.com/4Darmygeometry) ([#3217](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3217))
- **Tizen native builds for x64 and arm64** — Adds x64 and arm64 architectures to the Tizen native build matrix. ([#3620](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3620))
- **Apple TFMs move to 26.0 for libraries** — Aligns Apple-platform target frameworks with the new 26.0 SDKs for libraries while keeping apps on the unversioned TFM. ([#3798](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3798))
- **WebAssembly requires .NET 8+ Emscripten** — Drops native WebAssembly builds against pre-.NET 8 Emscripten so the WASM binaries stay aligned with the supported runtime. ([#4022](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4022))

## Release Candidate 1 (June 12, 2026)

Release Candidate 1 stabilised the line for stable — the Skia m148 bump, two SKPixmap span-correctness fixes, singleton-lifecycle rework, the final promotion of legacy paint text/font APIs to error, the WinUI Projection DLL fix, and the expat 2.8.1 and HarfBuzz 14.2.0 dependency refreshes.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.147.0-preview.3.1...v4.148.0-rc.1.2)

## Preview 3 (May 24, 2026)

Preview 3 landed the variable-font palettes, HBColor struct, animated WebP encoding and the CI/build hardening work.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.147.0-preview.2.1...v4.147.0-preview.3.1)

## Preview 2 (May 6, 2026)

Preview 2 opened up SKSurface/SKCanvas sampling options and shipped SKStream.GetData(), plus the SKPath finalizer fix.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.147.0-preview.1.1...v4.147.0-preview.2.1)

## Preview 1 (April 28, 2026)

Preview 1 cut the v4 line — Skia m132/m133/m147 engine bumps, the managed default-typeface bridge, Linux Bionic assets and Tizen x64/arm64 support.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.119.4...v4.147.0-preview.1.1)
